summary: Phase 4 (Courier QR Scanner), Phase 5 (Admin Locker Management), Phase 6 (Notifications) fully tested. 37/38 backend tests pass. All UI flows verified via Playwright. All new features functional.

minor.issue: Test only: test_signup_new_user fails because +250788TEST001 already registered from previous run. Not a bug - duplicate detection works correctly (test_signup_duplicate_phone passes).

ui_bugs.issue: Label shows 'payment_method' (raw i18n key) instead of 'Payment Method'. The translation key likely missing from the language context.

integration_issues.issue: Navigating directly to /admin/lockers without going through tab navigation shows 0 lockers (auth token lost on hard reload). Works correctly via tab navigation from admin panel.

react_native_issues.issue: Non-blocking deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' props deprecated (use boxShadow), 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated

action_items: Fix i18n key 'payment_method' label on Send step 5 - should display 'Payment Method' (check LanguageContext translations)
Auth persistence on direct URL navigation: admin/lockers shows empty list when navigated directly - token from AsyncStorage not restored before API call on direct navigation
critical_code_review_comments: notifications/read-all endpoint: PUT /api/notifications/read-all is defined AFTER PUT /api/notifications/{notif_id}/read - FastAPI may match 'read-all' as a notif_id parameter. Order matters in router definition. Test confirms it works (returns 200) but verify edge case.

Admin edit locker: handleSave sends only name/address for edits (line 91-95 has empty spread `...(editLocker.status ? {} : {})`). District, lat, lng are not sent in update - this is by design per the info box, but confirm is intentional.

success_rate.backend: 97% (37/38 tests - 1 test data issue not a bug)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created: TEST_Locker_Phase5 (later updated), TEST User Signup. Parcel AKB-M2GWQQYR created via send flow test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4/5/6 all working. Courier scan tab: web shows manual entry (no camera), mobile shows QR scan button. Manual parcel lookup works with tracking code. Status update grid shows options. Admin lockers: Create modal (name/address/district/lat/lng/compartments), Edit modal (pre-filled name+address), Status chip (Alert with options). Notifications: Bell icon with badge on user home, notifications screen with list, mark-all-read. Send parcel: 5-step flow works end-to-end to QR code screen. Minor issue: 'payment_method' i18n key showing as raw key on step 5.
